events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: fixture over tub without wet/damp rating. Residential electrical fixture installation rough-complete. Condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant (shock hazard in wet/damp location). Risk high or critical? Fixture over tub, if not wet/damp rated, risk of electrocution. Critical maybe. Need percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value 0. confidence 1.0. findings: luminaire installed within zone over bathtub/shower without damp/wet location rating; not suitable for wet/damp location; violates NEC 410.10(D) maybe. actions: remove/replace with appropriate damp or wet-location rated luminaire per NEC and manufacturer instructions; ensure within required clearance zones. references: NEC 410.10(D), 410.4 maybe. Need include component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant? The categories that may apply: installed-defective. Also non-compliant listed in schema. Use both. Work_stage rough-complete. order empty, workable empty, sound_source empty string? Schema string. Use "". event_time 0.0 rate 0.0. Ensure valid JSON.
